title: tsk daemon-status fails when multiple projects found
description: Running  raises ProjectMarkerError "multiple projects found" when multiple projects are discovered. Expected behavior: daemon-status should either disambiguate, scope to cwd project, or emit a user-friendly error with guidance. Stack trace in user report.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added shared Gherkin scenario for daemon-status with multiple projects. Updated Python and Rust CLI daemon-status/daemon-stop to catch project discovery errors and emit guidance without traceback. Tests not run.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added daemon lifecycle scenarios for missing project and missing dotfile paths; updated Behave runner to route error output into stderr when Click writes to stdout. Verified  and coverage gate at 100%.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: handles multiple discovered projects without traceback; either scopes to cwd project when unambiguous or returns a clear error with guidance. Error message should mention how to run from a specific project or how to disambiguate. Unit/BDD coverage added.
